title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report November 14 2025
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report November 14 2025
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report November 14 2025
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 14/11/2025
DCE iron ore futures continued to fluctuate rangebound with a stronger bias today, with the I2601 closingat 772.5 RMB, up 0.26% slightly from the previous trading day. Approaching the weekend, market transactions were sluggish. Spot cargo prices at ports remained largely stable compared to the previous trading day.
